heading: Planning
label: 426o–1 Planning
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 4 and is classified to .section 3 of Pub. L. 100–205section 426p of this title
Amendments1994—Subsec. (d). substituted “Natural Resources” for “Interior and Insular Affairs” after “Committee on”.Pub. L. 103–437
amendments: Amendments1994—Subsec. (d). substituted “Natural Resources” for “Interior and Insular Affairs” after “Committee on”.Pub. L. 103–437

children.heading: Preparation of plan for Redoubt Brannan
children.label: a Preparation of plan for Redoubt Brannan
children.text: The Secretary shall, on or before , prepare a plan for the preservation and interpretation of Redoubt Brannan.February 1, 1992

children.heading: Update of General Management Plan
children.label: b Update of General Management Plan
children.text: The Secretary shall, on or before , update the General Management Plan for the Stones River National Battlefield.March 31, 1993

children.heading: Technical assistance
children.label: c Technical assistance
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to provide technical assistance to the city and to Rutherford County in the development of zoning ordinances and other land use controls that would help preserve historically significant areas adjacent to the battlefield.

children.heading: Minor boundary revisions
children.label: d Minor boundary revisions
children.text: If the planning activities conducted under subsections (a) and (b) of this section show a need for minor revisions of the boundaries indicated on the map referred to in , the Secretary may, following timely notice in writing to the Committee on Natural Resources of the United States House of Representatives and to the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources of the United States Senate of his intention to do so and providing an opportunity for public comment, make such minor revisions by publication of a revised boundary map or other description in the Federal Register.section 426n of this title
